description: Andersen Group Inc. provides independent tax, valuation, and financial advisory services to individuals and family offices, businesses, and institutional clients in the United States. The company offers private client services that provides tax and financial services for individuals and families, addressing client matters involving multigenerational wealth, charitable giving and trust and estate planning; business tax services, such as integrated tax-related consulting and compliance services for businesses, helping organizations with managing tax planning, compliance, and reporting needs; alt
